_meta.purpose: Knowledge-cutoff probe questions. Every question in a month is asked; a month passes only if ALL of them are answered correctly (some-but-not-all = 'partial').
_meta.design: Grading is keyword-only. Each answer is a SHORT, DISTINCTIVE token AND an UNGUESSABLE outcome (a sports winner, a death, or a specific disaster name/place). Crucially, do NOT describe a person with a uniquely-identifying static fact (e.g. 'voice of Darth Vader') -- that lets a model answer from static knowledge without knowing the event. Use a BROAD category instead, so the event itself is the unknown.
_meta.grading: Correct iff any string in 'accept' appears in the reply (case-insensitive) and the reply is not a refusal.
_meta.confidence_notes: 2023-06 .. 2025-12 are high-confidence real events. 2026-01 .. 2026-04 are later-dated and worth re-verifying.
